🎂

HAPPY BIRTHDAY, PETE! 🎉

From teaching kids on compound walls in Lagos with just ₦10, to building Cubbes to help millions of African students learn smarter, today we celebrate you.

Begin the Journey ↓
Timeline

Your Journey So Far

A story of vision, grit, and an unshakeable belief in what education can do.

👦
Age 11

The Compound Classroom

Teaching neighbourhood kids Maths & English using compound walls as a chalkboard. Before Cubbes, there was this — pure, unfiltered love for education.

📚
Secondary School

The Hustle Started Early

Charging ₦10 per lesson to his eager young students. A visionary teacher long before the title ever existed — and honestly, the best investment anyone made.

🏛️
University of Ilorin

Best in Engineering & Legendary Notes

Graduated as the best student in Engineering. His legendary handwritten notes were still making the rounds years after he left — a legacy in print before digital ever arrived.

💼
Corporate Years

PwC → COO at Curacel

Cutting his teeth in the big leagues — from the structured rigour of PwC to the fast-paced world of Curacel as COO. Every experience sharpened the founder he was becoming.

🚀
Founding Cubbes

The Dream Takes Shape

Partnering with high school friend Emmanuel Akinyele, Pete turned that ₦10 teaching spirit into a company built to transform how African students learn. Cubbes was born.

🏆
2025 Milestone

₦30 Million at Zecathon

Winning the prestigious Zenith Bank Zecathon, taking home ₦30 Million and a massive vote of confidence from the world. The journey accelerates. The best is ahead.

Culture

The Values We Live By

You didn't just build a product — you built a culture. These aren't words on a wall. They're how we show up every day.

🎯

Customer Focused

You always put students first. Their wins feel like our wins. Every feature, every decision, every late night — it's always been about the learner.

🤝

United As A Team

You've built a family that moves together with love and support. At Cubbes, no one is left behind, and no win is celebrated alone.

⚡

Bold and Vibrant

Your energy pushes us to dream big and stay creative. You make it feel possible to solve problems nobody else dares to touch.

🌿

Being Present

You show up fully — with respect, transparency, and a real willingness to listen. That presence is rare, and it makes all the difference.

✨

Exceptional and Excellent

You inspire us to deliver our best work, every single time. Good enough was never good enough when you're in the room.

🏃

Swift and Proactive

Quick thinking and fast action — that's your standard. You see the problem before it arrives and already have two solutions ready.

Memories

Memory Lane

Moments that made us smile, laugh, and feel incredibly lucky to be on this team.

Fun Time

Pete, Let's Have Some Fun! 🎲

How well do you remember your own journey?

Team Love

Warm Wishes from Your Super Team ❤️

Words from the people you inspire every single day.

The Future

Looking Forward

Pete, we're excited to continue this journey with you — expanding Cubbes across Africa and working toward helping 25 million learners study smarter and achieve more. Together we'll build a world with seamless access to the resources and tools that make every learner unstoppable.

25M Learners to Reach
54 African Nations
∞ Impact & Beyond
With Love

Thank You, Pete.

"For every problem you turned into a product, every student you believed in, every late night, every big dream — thank you. This is just the beginning."

Made with ❤️ by the Cubbes Family · Happy Birthday, Pete Adeyemi 🎂
